calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Maring for and with Charles Vinson. Walter Vinson in Propria Persona.

Charles Vinson explained the reasons for the delay in Administration of the Estate. Walter Vinson epxressed his concerns. The accounting petition was approved (subject to review of the order). The Court advised the Parties to expect a reduction of the extraordinary fees as well as statutory fees and stated that the fees for preparation of the accounting will be charged to the Executor''s fees.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Jan-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Advanced From Aug-22-11 To Jul-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Maring for and with Charles Vinson. Tahar Vinson also present.

Mr. Maring stated that he is prepared to submit the inventory and appraisals to the Probate Referee but that he does not have the number of shares of the ING account and that ING is difficult to deal with. Status of closing of the Estate was set for October 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Text Ruling

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Jul-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal And Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Maring for Charles Vinson. Walter Vinson (Son) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Vinson expressed concern about the personal items being removed from the home. The Court informed Counsel that the non-cash assets need to be inventoried and that he had to respond in writing to the Court with regard to said assets. The Court also informed Counsel that the Petition for Status of Administration needs to be re-filed and noticed explaining everything that has occurred. The matter was continued to April 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition under Probate Code 12200 or filing of a Petition for Final Distribution, and filing of the Final Inventory.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry B. Maring for and with Devoir Vinson (Petitioner)

Mr. Maring stated that the drafting attorney was deceased in 2005, that he sent a letter to the witness, that he contacted the Bar Association, and that there was no record of disposition of the attorney's files. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $10,000.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jackie Alameda Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Continued To Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2008 Continued To Aug-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
